audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Exodus / Shemot artisan and Sabbath instruction text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for Bezalel/Oholiab, Spirit-filled craft, wise-hearted artisans, Sabbath sign, and tablets.

verses.restored: See, I have called by name Bezalel son of Uri son of Hur, of tribe of Judah.
I have filled him with Spirit of Divine, in wisdom, understanding, knowledge, and every craft,
to devise designs, to work in gold, silver, and bronze,
in cutting stone for setting and carving wood, to work in every craft.
And I, look, I have given with him Oholiab son of Ahisamach, of tribe of Dan, and in heart of every wise-hearted one I have given wisdom; they shall make all that I commanded you:
tent of meeting, ark of testimony, cover that is upon it, and all vessels of tent,
table and its vessels, pure lampstand and all its vessels, incense altar,
altar of burnt offering and all its vessels, basin and its stand,
woven garments, holy garments for Aaron the priest, garments of his sons to serve as priests,
anointing oil and fragrant incense for holy place; according to all I commanded you, they shall do.
And you, speak to children of Israel, saying: Surely my Sabbaths you shall keep, for it is sign between me and you throughout your generations, to know that I, YHWH, sanctify you.
You shall keep the Sabbath, for it is holy to you; one profaning it shall surely be put to death, for everyone doing work in it, that soul/life shall be cut off from midst of its people.
Six days work shall be done, but seventh day is Sabbath of Sabbath-rest, holy to YHWH; everyone doing work on Sabbath day shall surely be put to death.
Children of Israel shall keep the Sabbath, to make/do the Sabbath throughout their generations as age-long covenant.
It is sign between me and children of Israel into the age; for in six days YHWH made heavens and earth, and on seventh day he ceased and was refreshed.
When he finished speaking with him on Mount Sinai, he gave to Moses two tablets of testimony, tablets of stone, written by finger of Divine.

translation_notes: Bezalel and Oholiab are called by name; artistry is Spirit-filled wisdom, understanding, knowledge, and craft.
Wise-hearted artisans receive wisdom for making sacred space; craft is not secondary to theology.
Sabbath closes the tabernacle instruction block: even sacred work stops for holy rest.
Severe Sabbath penalties are source-preserved and require ethical/reception audit; do not use for coercive modern practice.
Finger of Divine links tablets to direct Divine inscription.
safety_note: Sabbath is covenant sign and liberation-rest; severe penalty language belongs to ancient covenant enforcement and must not be used for modern violence or coercion. Spirit-filled craft and rest are the governing theological themes here.
